nasb.text: Some of the heads of fathers’ households gave into the treasury of the work 20,000 gold drachmas and 2,200 silver minas.

esv.text: And some of the heads of fathers’ houses gave into the treasury of the work 20,000 darics of gold and 2,200 minas of silver.

cnv.text: 族長捐給這工程的庫房金子一百六十八公斤、銀子一千二百五十公斤。

ccb.text: 族长捐出一百七十公斤金子和一千二百公斤银子。
